testcase.name: test_create_debit_reason_and_update_note_type

failure.message:
AssertionError: Created reason missing note_type=debit: {'id': 'ff5a316e-e0dd-4024-b205-b771f1d3aede', 'tenant_id': 'nyla-air-water', 'reason_code': 'TEST_DEBIT_1782402333', 'reason_name': 'TEST Custom Debit', 'description': 'iter237 test', 'category': 'empty_reusable', 'credit_type': 'sku_return_credit', 'credit_percentage': None, 'return_to_factory': False, 'requires_inspection': False, 'applies_to': ['customer', 'distributor'], 'note_type': 'credit', 'is_active': True, 'is_system': False, 'display_order': 0, 'color': '#F59E0B', 'created_at': '2026-06-25T15:45:33.346230+00:00', 'updated_at': '2026-06-25T15:45:33.346232+00:00', 'created_by': '7d03cff4-4db2-4b2e-969b-f5b3d57d58a6'} assert 'credit' == 'debit'
- debit + credit

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_237_debit_reasons.py:119: in test_create_debit_reason_and_update_note_type assert created.get("note_type") == "debit", f"Created reason missing note_type=debit: {created}" E AssertionError: Created reason missing note_type=debit: {'id': 'ff5a316e-e0dd-4024-b205-b771f1d3aede', 'tenant_id': 'nyla-air-water', 'reason_code': 'TEST_DEBIT_1782402333', 'reason_name': 'TEST Custom Debit', 'description': 'iter237 test', 'category': 'empty_reusable', 'credit_type': 'sku_return_credit', 'credit_percentage': None, 'return_to_factory': False, 'requires_inspection': False, 'applies_to': ['customer', 'distributor'], 'note_type': 'credit', 'is_active': True, 'is_system': False, 'display_order': 0, 'color': '#F59E0B', 'created_at': '2026-06-25T15:45:33.346230+00:00', 'updated_at': '2026-06-25T15:45:33.346232+00:00', 'created_by': '7d03cff4-4db2-4b2e-969b-f5b3d57d58a6'} E assert 'credit' == 'debit' E E - debit E + credit
